Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to add constraints to mitigate bias The given model has activities StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo We need to introduce sensitive attributes like ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace and activities like ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantRace etc But the original model doesnt have those So we must invent some activities that represent sensitive attribute checks or manual reviews We can add new activities to the model by adding constraints that refer to them The model can have new activities not originally listed The problem says add new constraints that limit the processs bias and suggests adding activities like ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantRace Since the model is a dictionary of constraints we can add constraints involving new activity names Thats acceptable

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to ensure fairness eg if a decision step like FinalDecision occurs for a sensitive applicant ManualReview must coexist Also decision steps cannot immediately follow a sensitive attribute event without BiasMitigationCheck Also non-succession from sensitive attribute to reject

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Well add 1 coexistence between ManualReview and FinalDecision with support confidence 10 This ensures that if either occurs both must occur in the same trace That forces a manual review whenever a final decision is made 2 response add CheckApplicantRace ManualReview meaning if a race check happens then eventually a manual review must occur 3 non-succession add CheckApplicantRace FinalDecision meaning that a race check cannot be directly followed by a final decision This prevents immediate bias 4 precedence add ManualReview FinalDecision ensuring that manual review must occur before final decision But coexistence already implies both are present but not ordering To enforce order we can add precedence ManualReview precedes FinalDecision The dictionary maps first activity to second activity

Name: Validation - IND
Text: We could also add chainprecedence to enforce immediate precedence But we already have non-succession to prevent immediate from Check but we might want ManualReview to immediately precede Not necessary We might add responded existence between CheckApplicantRace and BiasMitigationCheck But keep it simple

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to preserve the original constraints So we update the dictionary by adding new entries to existing constraint types and possibly adding new constraint types if not present but they are all present as empty dicts So we can add to those Lets define new activities ManualReview CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck Well add constraints Now we need to ensure the added constraints are reasonable and documented Also note The original model has existence of StartApplication and FinalDecision init of StartApplication coexistence of StartApplication and FinalDecision response from StartApplication to RequestAdditionalInfo succession from RequestAdditionalInfo to FinalDecision So the process start then eventually request info then final decision Also coexistence ensures start and final appear together So our new constraints should integrate

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Write the updated dictionary Well produce Python code with the updated dict Lets write the answer
